title: scorzonera laciniata subsp. calcitrapifolia
intro: Scorzonera laciniata subsp. calcitrapifolia is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the lesser scorpion's tail or scorpion's tail. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Scorzonera laciniata subsp. calcitrapifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its potential to support bone health and protect against oxidative stress. Scorzonera laciniata subsp. calcitrapifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
